commands.title: /function
commands.description: Runs a group of commands stored in a .mcfunction file.
commands.breakdown: Requires a behavior pack. Executes every line in the function file sequentially.

commands.title: /schedule
commands.description: Schedules a function to run after a specific delay.
commands.breakdown: Time is in ticks (e.g., 20t = 1s). Great for timed traps or cycle logic.

commands.title: /testfor
commands.description: Checks for entities matching a selector.
commands.breakdown: Outputs signal strength or success message. Useful in command blocks.

commands.title: /tickingarea
commands.description: Keeps specific world areas loaded even if no players are nearby.
commands.breakdown: Essential for 'always-on' command machines or farms. Supports circle or box areas.

commands.title: /gamerule
commands.breakdown: common rules: doDaylightCycle, keepInventory, mobGriefing, commandBlockOutput.

commands.title: /script
commands.description: Controls the script watchdog and profiler for GameTest scripts.
